_comment: Universal Linear Agent Router — multi-project, multi-model config. Copy this to config.local.json to override without touching version control.

implement: 1. Read the full issue from Linear ({id})
6. In Linear: move the issue state to 'In Review', remove the '{lane}' label, add the '{reviewer}' label
7. Leave a Linear comment describing what was done
review: 1. Read the issue and all comments
4. Leave a structured review comment on the Linear issue
5. If approved: move issue state to 'Done', remove the '{lane}' label
If changes needed: move issue state to 'In Progress', remove the '{lane}' label, add the '{reviewer}' label, describe required changes in your comment
You are the REVIEWER. Do not re-implement unless there is a real defect.
